/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION FOR BAIL HEARING/INTC/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE FOLLOWING MOTIONS:/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO EXCLUDE NON-TESTIFYING WITNESSES AND THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DESIGNATE OFFICER JOHN GARDNER ASINVESTIGATIVE OFFICER/WIT SWORN:JUAN MIGUEL PENA SR,/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER JOHN GARDNER/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, PICTURE OF KNIFE/HTA1:1/X:THE COURT FURTHER HOLDS DEFENDANT ON ATTACHED ALLEGATIONS/X:THE COURT DENIES DEFENSE 17B AND BAIL MOTION/X:THE COURT ORDERS BAIL REMAIN AT 35000/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNEDTO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/X:DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR OR RELEASE VIAACM, DENIED/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:1-2-18/987,2/BAIL:35,000/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:12-29-18/X:REPORT IS FOR REFERRAL TO BHC/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET/
